name: Infected Ant Queen
description: The result of infecting an ant queen in a previous cycle. Even though fungus has overtaken her, she remains strangely docile and works more like NG+ progression than an enemy encounter.
behavior: She stays still inside the anthill and only responds to the Moldy Hoagie. Unlike the other queens, she can be fed multiple times across different cycles to keep unlocking recipes.
interactionWithPlayer: The player creates her by using an infected offering on a normal queen and then advancing into New Game+. Once present, she accepts Moldy Hoagies to unlock new gear and explosive recipes.
interactionWithCreatures: She does not pacify the infected ants in the anthill. Infected workers and soldiers will still attack the player exactly the same even while she is present.
strategy: The key is planning your NG+ progression. The first fed infected queen opens the major recipes, while the second and third finish the Glowbasa accessory set, so wasting cycles is inefficient.

rewardUnlocks.name: First queen fed
rewardUnlocks.detail: Unlocks the Sausager, Killbasa, Glowbasa Link, and more efficient Bratburst, Splatburst, and Healbasa recipes.

rewardUnlocks.name: Third queen fed
rewardUnlocks.detail: Unlocks the Glowbasa Necklace and completes the main infected queen reward line.

specialTraits: The infected offering for the red queen is the only one you can prepare in the base save; the gum and toejam versions come later in NG+.
To unlock everything, you need to feed three different infected queens across NG+1, NG+2, and NG+3.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: No combat. Its progression depends on how many different infected queens you feed with Moldy Hoagies across New Game+ cycles.
